title: goniopteris schippii
intro: Goniopteris schippii, also known as the Schippi's fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Goniopteris schippii include its ability to treat various conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Goniopteris schippii is often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves, where its extracts can be applied topically to promote healing and relieve symptoms.
